content:
No sooner...than and As soon as

'No sooner...than' နဲ့ 'As soon as' က အလားတူ အဓိပ္ပာယ်ရှိပါတယ်။ တစ်ခုခုဖြစ်ပြီးတာနဲ့ နောက်တစ်ခု ချက်ချင်းဖြစ်တာကို ပြောတာပါ။

Structure/Formula: No sooner + did + Subject + V1 + than + Subject + V2 | As soon as + Subject + V2, Subject + V1

👉 As soon as the bell rang, the students went out. → No sooner did the bell ring than the students went out.

👉 As soon as he saw the lion, he ran away. → No sooner did he see the lion than he ran away.

👉 As soon as the rain stopped, we went home. → No sooner did the rain stop than we went home.

🔑 Key Points:

  • 'No sooner' နဲ့ 'than' ကို တွဲသုံးရမယ်။
  • 'No sooner' စတဲ့ ဝါကျမှာ 'did' သုံးပြီး Verb ကို V1 ပြန်ပြောင်းရမယ်။

⚠️ Common Mistakes:

  • 'No sooner...when' လို့ မှားရေးတတ်တယ်။ 'than' ပဲ သုံးရမယ်။
  • 'did' သုံးထားရင် Verb ကို V1 ပဲ သုံးရမယ်။
